issues: Code imports fetch_reddit_activity from reddit_activity adapter - correct.
Code uses adapter output columns 'date', 'posts', 'comments' - correct.
Code uses 'sentiment_score' and 'ticker' columns which are NOT in adapter contract returns - missing in spec.
Signal logic checks sentiment_score increase >40% and mention_volume >50 - matches spec trigger condition.
Signal logic exit condition checks sentiment_score < 80% of peak or held >=5 days - matches spec exit condition.
Universe matches spec universe exactly - correct.
Position sizing uses 2% allocation per position and max 5 concurrent positions - matches spec.
Signal names RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD are acceptable per instructions.
However, code assumes 'sentiment_score' and 'ticker' columns exist in adapter data, but adapter contract only returns 'date', 'posts', 'comments' - missing required data columns for correct logic.
Therefore, code does not fully comply with adapter contract and spec data requirements.
